item.title: 我发布了 4 个免费的 ReactJS 编码挑战：为响应式 UI 构建功能 | I Published 4 Free ReactJS Coding Challenges: Build Functionality for Responsive UI
item.description:
前端开发人员在软件公司中扮演着多种角色。 如果我们对这些角色进行分类，我们会看到两大类：UI 开发人员和业务逻辑开发人员。 第二个需要良好的逻辑练习，因为您必须使 UI 相应地工作。 我们在这里为您准备了一些有趣的 ReactJS 挑战，它们将帮助您测试您的 ReactJS 技能。

这些基本上是编码挑战，其中用户界面已经构建在 Reactjs 中，它也是响应式的但不是功能性的，你的工作是通过使用 Reactjs 主要是 Javascript 编写业务逻辑来使它们起作用。

在下面的部分中给出了“用户故事”，因此要使 UI 发挥作用，您必须完成所有“用户故事”。

技术栈： ReactJS 与 Typescript

谁可以使用这些 ReactJS 编码挑战？

  1. 寻找有趣的小前端编码挑战来测试他们的ReactJS 逻辑构建技能的初学者开发人员

  2. 对构建可以转换为微型 SAAS 的小型工具感兴趣的开发人员

  3. 寻找ReactJS 招聘挑战以评估候选人的 ReactJS 编码技能的公司

所有挑战都是免费的。 我希望挑战与众不同，并精心设计了它们。 在每个挑战中，我都涵盖了 JavaScript 和 Reactjs 的不同技能集，从数组到对象，从字符串到正则表达式，再到 Reactjs 钩子。

挑战 #1：文本分析器工具

这是一个简单的挑战，您必须为文本分析器构建逻辑，计算文本区域中写入的单词、字母、段落和更多文本的数量。

挑战说明： www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge -...
演示应用程序： reactjs-text-analyzer.netlify.app/

挑战 #2：React 密码生成器

这个挑战也适合初学者。 在此挑战中，您将为密码生成器开发逻辑，包括用于创建和验证具有指定强度的密码、复制密码以及具有所需字符的密码的选项。

挑战说明： www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge -...
演示应用程序： reactjs-password-generator.vercel.app/

挑战 #3：随机报价生成器

挑战自己使用 ReactJS 构建随机报价生成器并展示您的前端开发技能。 通过这个有趣的代码挑战来激发您的创造力！ 此挑战与文本分析器和密码生成器略有不同，因为您需要使用 Axios 从 json-server 获取数据。

挑战说明： www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge -...
演示应用程序： react-random-quote-application.netlify...

挑战 #4：CRUD Typescript 任务列表应用程序

这个 React Typescript Tasklist/Todo 挑战要求您执行 CRUD 操作，并编写干净、可重用、可管理和可扩展的代码。 这个挑战与您完成的最后三个挑战不同，并且更具挑战性。 如果你可以独立完成这个 ReactJS Typescript 任务列表挑战，你可以很容易地被聘为实习生/初级 React 开发人员。

挑战说明： www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge -...
演示应用程序： react-tasklist.vercel.app/

完成 ReactJS 挑战后要做什么？

  1. 比较你的代码和我的代码：由于有很多方法可以完成编码挑战和构建逻辑，你可以通过我的代码进行比较并学习编写更少的代码行。

  2. 添加到您的投资组合：您也可以将这些挑战添加到您的投资组合中，但要先更改工具的整体布局。 您可以使用自己的主题并以任何方式对其进行自定义，以使其更加令人印象深刻。 由于我们使用的是 CSS 主题，您只需在主题文件中替换或添加变量即可。

  3. 在您的 Twitter 句柄上分享：您还可以通过添加#codevertiser #100DaysOfCode（如果您正在跟踪旅程）、#frontEndChallenges #reactjsChallenges，在 Twitter 上分享您对 ReactJS 编码挑战的答案或经验

你能给 ReactJS Challenges GitHub 仓库加注星标吗？

我喜欢创建免费内容，帮助开发人员开始他们的工作并在他们的职业生涯中脱颖而出。 每个挑战都需要大量的时间来创造。

首先，我集思广益提出挑战想法。 然后，我与一位自由 UI/UX 设计师合作来设计这个想法。 之后，我将设计转化为代码并为挑战编写内容。

这是一个漫长的过程，需要时间、精力和资源。

通过为ReactJS 编码挑战存储库加注星标，您将激励我创建更多这样的免费内容。



原文:

Front-end developers play multiple roles in software companies. If we categorize these roles, we will see two broad categories: UI developers and business logic developers. The UI developer implements the design, while the other implements the logic and makes the app functional.

The second one requires sound logic practice because you have to make UI work accordingly. We are here with some interesting Reactjs Challenges for you that will help you test your ReactJS skills.

These are basically coding challenges in which the user interface is already built in Reactjs and it is also responsive but not functional, and your job is to make them functional by writing business logic using Reactjs mainly Javascript.

In the section below "User Stories" are given so to make the UI functional you have to fulfill all the "User Stories".

Tech Stack: ReactJS with Typescript

Who Can Use these ReactJS Coding Challenges?

  1. Beginner developers looking for a fun little frontend coding challenges to test their ReactJS logic-building skills

  2. Developers interested in building small tools that they can convert into micro SAAS

  3. Companies looking for ReactJS hiring challenges to assess their candidate's ReactJS coding skills

List of Reactjs Challenges

All challenges are free. I wanted the challenges to be different and designed them carefully. In each challenge, I have covered different skill sets of JavaScript and Reactjs, from the array to object, the string to regex, and Reactjs hooks.

Challenge #1: Text Analyzer Tool

It is an easy challenge in which you have to build logic for a text analyzer that will count the number of words, letters, paragraphs, and more of the text written in the textarea.

Challenge Description: www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge-…
Demo App: reactjs-text-analyzer.netlify.app/

Challenge #2: React Password Generator

This challenge is suitable for beginners as well. In this challenge, you will develop logic for a password generator, including options for creating and validating a password with a specified strength, copying the password, and passwords with desired characters.

Challenge Description: www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge-…
Demo App: reactjs-password-generator.vercel.app/

Challenge #3: Random Quote Generator

Challenge yourself to build a random quote generator using ReactJS and showcase your front-end development skills. Flourish your creativity with this fun code challenge! This challenge differs slightly from Text Analyzer and Password Generator because you need to fetch data from json-server using Axios.

Challenge Description: www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge-…
Demo App: react-random-quote-application.netlify.…

Challenge #4: CRUD Typescript Tasklist App

This React Typescript Tasklist/Todo challenge requires you to perform CRUD operations with instructions to write clean, reusable, manageable, and scalable code. This challenge is different and more challenging than the last three challenges you have completed. If you can complete this ReactJS Typescript Tasklist challenge independently, you can be easily hired as an intern/junior React developer.

Challenge Description: www.codevertiser.com/reactjs-challenge-…
Demo App: react-tasklist.vercel.app/

What to do when you complete ReactJS challenge?

  1. Compare your code with mine: As there are many ways to do coding challenges and build logic, you can go through my code to compare and learn to write less lines of code.

  2. Add to your Portfolio: You can also add these challenges to your portfolio, but after changing the overall layout of the tool. You can use your own theme and customize it in any way to make it more impressive. Since we are using themes for CSS, you only have to replace or add variables in the theme file.

  3. Share on your Twitter handle: You can also share your answer or your experience of ReactJS coding challenge on Twitter by adding #codevertiser #100DaysOfCode (if you are following the journey), #frontEndChallenges #reactjsChallenges

Can you star the ReactJS Challenges GitHub repo?

I love creating free content that helps developers start their jobs and excel in their careers. Each challenge requires a lot of time to create.

First, I brainstorm the challenge idea. Then, I collaborate with a freelance UI/UX designer to design the idea. After that, I convert the design into code and write content for the challenge.

It's a lengthy process that requires time, energy, and resources.

By starring ReactJS Coding Challenges repository, you will motivate me to create more free content like this.
item.author: abdulbasit313

item.title: 开发者 vs ChatGPT：开发者如何始终赢得比赛？ | Developers vs ChatGPT: How Developers Win the Game All the Time?
item.description:
在不断发展的技术领域，开发人员在塑造我们生活的数字世界方面发挥着至关重要的作用。他们是架构师、问题解决者和创新软件解决方案背后的创造性思维。 虽然像 ChatGPT 这样的人工智能模型在自然语言处理方面取得了重大进步，但开发人员仍然是软件开发成功的关键。 本文探讨了开发人员始终胜过 ChatGPT 的原因，以及他们独特的技能和能力如何赋予他们制胜优势。

人类创造力的力量

将开发人员与 ChatGPT 区分开来的基本方面之一是他们无与伦比的创造力。 开发人员拥有超越现有界限思考并提出独特和原创解决方案的能力。 虽然 ChatGPT 可以根据模式和预先存在的数据生成文本，但它缺乏开发人员带来的内在创造性思维。 开发人员擅长寻找解决复杂问题的创新方法，利用他们的创造力开发满足特定要求并超出用户期望的软件。

深入了解用户需求

开发人员对用户需求的深刻理解，源于他们对最终用户的同理心。 他们与用户互动，收集反馈并分析他们的需求，以创建真正解决他们痛点的软件。 这种以用户为中心的方法允许开发人员构建符合用户期望的直观界面、无缝用户体验和功能。 虽然 ChatGPT 可以提供自动响应，但开发人员可以利用他们的人情味来创建在更深层次上与用户产生共鸣的软件。

知识和专长

开发人员在各自领域拥有大量知识和专业知识。 他们对编程语言、框架和技术有全面的了解。 他们的技术技能使他们能够构建高效执行的强大且可扩展的软件解决方案。 开发人员还具有通过各个行业的经验获得的特定领域知识的优势。 这种专业知识使他们能够创建满足特定业务需求的定制解决方案。

协同工作环境

软件开发很少是一项孤军奋战，开发人员在协作工作环境中茁壮成长。 他们擅长团队合作，利用每个团队成员的优势来取得卓越的成果。 开发团队内部的有效沟通和协调可确保共享想法、解决挑战并利用集体知识。 这种协作方法可最大限度地提高效率并培养持续学习和改进的文化。

道德决策

开发人员负责在整个软件开发过程中做出道德决策。 他们确保他们创造的技术符合道德标准，并解决潜在的隐私和安全问题。 开发人员应对他们的创作对社会产生的影响负责，并采取积极措施减轻任何负面影响。 虽然 ChatGPT 可以生成文本，但开发人员有道德指南针来指导他们做出优先考虑用户和社会福祉的决策。

灵活性和适应性

软件开发是一个动态领域，需求不断变化。 开发人员在应对这些变化时表现出非凡的灵活性和适应性。 他们可以快速调整和整合新的功能、技术和框架，以满足行业不断变化的需求。 开发人员拥有面向未来的软件解决方案的远见，确保可扩展性和寿命。 这种适应性使它们有别于 ChatGPT，ChatGPT 依赖于预先训练的模型并且可能难以跟上快速变化的需求。

结论

在开发人员与 ChatGPT 的较量中，开发人员成为明显的赢家。 他们的创造力、对用户需求的深刻理解、知识、协作技能、道德决策和适应能力使他们比 ChatGPT 等人工智能模型更具竞争优势。 虽然 ChatGPT 在自动执行某些任务方面有其优势，但开发人员在推动创新、提供量身定制的解决方案以及创建真正丰富用户生活的软件方面仍然不可或缺。

常见问题

问：开发人员如何跟上技术的进步？

答：开发人员通过不断学习、参加会议、参与在线社区以及探索新工具和框架，随时了解技术进步。

答：虽然自动化可以简化开发的某些方面，但软件开发的复杂性需要开发人员具备的创造力、解决问题的技能和领域专业知识。

答：ChatGPT 可以通过自动执行某些任务、生成代码片段以及对常见查询提供快速响应来帮助开发人员。 但是，它不能取代人类开发人员的综合技能和创造力。

问：ChatGPT 能否完全取代对人类开发人员的需求？

虽然它可以提供自动化解决方案，但人类开发人员带来了对软件开发至关重要的独特见解、创造力和道德决策能力。

问：开发人员如何利用 ChatGPT 等人工智能技术？

答：开发人员可以利用 ChatGPT 等 AI 技术来增强他们的工作，自动执行重复性任务并提高生产力。 通过将 AI 集成到他们的工作流程中，开发人员可以专注于需要人类创造力和解决问题技能的更高层次的任务。



原文:

In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, developers play a crucial role in shaping the digital world we live in. They are the architects, the problem solvers, and the creative minds behind innovative software solutions. While AI models like ChatGPT have made significant advancements in natural language processing, developers continue to hold the key to success in software development. This article explores the reasons why developers consistently outshine ChatGPT and how their unique skills and abilities give them the winning edge.

The Power of Human Creativity

One of the fundamental aspects that differentiate developers from ChatGPT is their unparalleled creativity. Developers possess the ability to think beyond existing boundaries and come up with unique and original solutions. While ChatGPT can generate text based on patterns and pre-existing data, it lacks the inherent creative thinking that developers bring to the table. Developers excel in finding innovative ways to solve complex problems, leveraging their creativity to develop software that meets specific requirements and exceeds user expectations.

Deep Understanding of User Needs

Developers have a deep understanding of user needs, which stems from their ability to empathize with the end-users. They engage with the users, gather feedback, and analyze their requirements to create software that truly addresses their pain points. This user-centric approach allows developers to build intuitive interfaces, seamless user experiences, and functionalities that align with the users' expectations. While ChatGPT can provide automated responses, developers can leverage their human touch to create software that resonates with the users on a deeper level.

Knowledge and Expertise

Developers possess a vast amount of knowledge and expertise in their respective domains. They have a comprehensive understanding of programming languages, frameworks, and technologies. Their technical skills enable them to build robust and scalable software solutions that perform efficiently. Developers also have the advantage of domain-specific knowledge, gained through experience in various industries. This expertise allows them to create tailored solutions that cater to specific business needs.

Collaborative Work Environment

Software development is rarely a solitary endeavor, and developers thrive in collaborative work environments. They excel in teamwork, leveraging the strengths of each team member to deliver exceptional results. Effective communication and coordination within the development team ensure that ideas are shared, challenges are addressed, and collective knowledge is harnessed. This collaborative approach maximizes efficiency and fosters a culture of continuous learning and improvement.

Ethical Decision Making

Developers are responsible for making ethical decisions throughout the software development process. They ensure that the technologies they create align with ethical standards and address potential privacy and security concerns. Developers are accountable for the impact their creations have on society and take proactive measures to mitigate any negative consequences. While ChatGPT can generate text, developers have the moral compass to guide them in making decisions that prioritize the well-being of users and society.

Flexibility and Adaptability

Software development is a dynamic field, with requirements constantly evolving. Developers exhibit remarkable flexibility and adaptability in responding to these changes. They can quickly pivot and incorporate new functionalities, technologies, and frameworks to meet the evolving demands of the industry. Developers possess the foresight to future-proof their software solutions, ensuring scalability and longevity. This adaptability sets them apart from ChatGPT, which relies on pre-trained models and may struggle to keep up with rapidly changing requirements.

Conclusion

In the developers vs ChatGPT battle, developers emerge as the clear winners. Their creativity, deep understanding of user needs, knowledge, collaboration skills, ethical decision-making, and adaptability give them a competitive edge over AI models like ChatGPT. While ChatGPT has its merits in automating certain tasks, developers continue to be indispensable in driving innovation, delivering tailored solutions, and creating software that truly enriches the lives of users.

FAQs

Q: How can developers keep up with the advancements in technology?

A: Developers stay updated with advancements in technology through continuous learning, attending conferences, participating in online communities, and exploring new tools and frameworks.

Q: Is there a risk of automation replacing developers in the future?

A: While automation may streamline certain aspects of development, the complex nature of software development requires the creativity, problem-solving skills, and domain expertise that developers possess.

Q: What role does ChatGPT play in software development?

A: ChatGPT can assist developers by automating certain tasks, generating code snippets, and providing quick responses to common queries. However, it cannot replace the comprehensive skill set and creativity of human developers.

Q: Can ChatGPT replace the need for human developers entirely?

A: ChatGPT cannot replace human developers entirely. While it can provide automated solutions, human developers bring unique insights, creativity, and ethical decision-making capabilities that are crucial in software development.

Q: How can developers leverage AI technologies like ChatGPT?

A: Developers can leverage AI technologies like ChatGPT to augment their work, automate repetitive tasks, and improve productivity. By integrating AI into their workflows, developers can focus on higher-level tasks that require human creativity and problem-solving skills.
